evals.prompt: Check my AAPL iron condor: sold $220 put / bought $200 put / sold $275 call / bought $300 call, total credit $2.86, expires May 1 2026.
evals.expected_output: Status card showing SAFE ZONE. AAPL is ~$248, giving ~11% put buffer and ~11% call buffer. Both sides comfortable. Should show both buffers, worst buffer, P&L, and 'let theta work' guidance.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted iron condor status card with IRON CONDOR MONITOR header

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones: SAFE, WATCH, WARNING, DANGER, or ACT NOW

assertions.name: safe_zone_for_aapl
assertions.description: Response classifies as SAFE ZONE given both buffers are >8%

assertions.name: shows_both_buffers
assertions.description: Response shows both put buffer % and call buffer %, plus identifies which is worse

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L per contract and loss% of max loss

assertions.name: actionable_guidance
assertions.description: Response provides zone-appropriate guidance (for SAFE: no action, let theta work)

evals.prompt: How is my NVDA iron condor? I have: sold $155 put / bought $140 put / sold $195 call / bought $215 call, $3.48 credit, expires May 1 2026.
evals.expected_output: Status card for NVDA. Stock at ~$172.70, put buffer ~11.4%, call buffer ~12.9%. Both comfortable — SAFE ZONE. Should identify which side is under more pressure (put side is closer).

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted status card

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones

assertions.name: shows_both_buffers
assertions.description: Response shows both put and call buffer percentages

assertions.name: identifies_worse_side
assertions.description: Response identifies which side (put or call) has the smaller buffer

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L and cost to close

assertions.name: actionable_guidance
assertions.description: Response provides concrete action suggestion appropriate to the zone

evals.prompt: Is my SPY condor in trouble? Sold $595 put / bought $535 put / sold $691 call / bought $760 call, got $6.77 credit, expires April 30 2026.
evals.expected_output: Status card for SPY. Should check both sides, show buffers, classify zone, and address the user's concern about whether the condor is 'in trouble'. Should include profit zone range.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted status card

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones

assertions.name: addresses_concern
assertions.description: Response directly addresses whether the condor is 'in trouble' based on the zone and metrics

assertions.name: shows_both_buffers
assertions.description: Response shows put and call buffer percentages

assertions.name: shows_profit_zone
assertions.description: Response shows the profit zone range (breakeven low to breakeven high)
